Title: Figueiredo, José de
Overview: historian of Portuguese art; curator of the Museu do Arte antiga; rediscovered and restored the paintings of Nuno Gonçalves; studied at l'école du Louvre; friends with Rodin; president of the Academia de Belas Artes
Selected Bibliography: O pinto Nuno Gonçalves. Lisbon, 1910.; Arte portugues primitivo. Lisbon.
Sources: Bazin, Germain. Histoire de l'histoire de l'art: de Vasari à nos jours. Paris: Albin Michel, 1986, p. 449.
